description: Create a domain-specific Talon voice command module for OSINT searches within the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\osint_tools\. The module must consist of three components: a list named user.osint_category in osint.talon-list (mapping map, scholar, flight, and network), a Python action user.osint_search(category: str, query: str) in osint.py, and a voice command investigate {user.osint_category} <user.text> in osint.talon. The Python action must format URLs for OpenStreetMap (encoded query), Google Scholar (encoded query), FlightAware (uppercase, no spaces), and BGPView (no spaces), open them in a web browser, and append an audit entry to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\osint_audit_log.txt in the format [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] - [CATEGORY] - [FINAL_URL].
